title: Orc Hut
description: This mod adds orc monsters along with their new orc hut
body:
This mod adds new aggressive Orc mobs to the game, equipped with stone swords.

They live in new orc hut structures found in plains or forest biomes.

Inside these huts, you’ll find an orc spawner, some decorations, and valuable loot worth fighting for.

The orc mobs also come with custom voice lines.
![Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b32577da0b3abf777b22578ecf7d5dac4222976.jpeg)

feel free to put it in your modpack!
